name: toolvault
description: Your tool discovery system. Use this to find and retrieve tools from the ToolVault. Actions: 'search' finds tools by what you need to do, 'read' gets the full spec for a specific tool, 'list' shows all available tools by category.

action.description: search=find tools by query, read=get full tool spec by name, list=show all tools by category

query.description: For search: natural language description of what you need (e.g., 'send a text message', 'generate an image')

tool_name.description: For read: exact tool name to retrieve (e.g., 'send_sms', 'generate_image')

category.description: For list: filter by category (e.g., 'communication', 'media_generation', 'email'). Omit for all.
